Birthday Boy Banner: This game-themed birthday banner is made of high-quality materials, with bright colors, is not easy to fade, has a smooth surface without burrs, and can be reused
Happy Birthday Banner Blue: This 12th birthday decoration is carefully designed to celebrate the boy's 12th birthday party, which can make the whole celebration more vivid and memorable

12th Birthday Decorations: This banner decoration set is suitable for hanging on any occasion, whether on a wall, window, curtain, or dining table. you can place it above the cake or gift table or use it as a background for taking pictures to add a festive atmosphere
12th Birthday Banner: Whether it is a gathering with friends or a warm moment with family, this banner will be the highlight of your party and create a joyful and warm atmosphere
